sp_widget.name: Create Change from Problem
sp_widget.description: Allows L2/L3 support to create change requests from problems. Supports Infrastructure type with CAB approval and auto task creation.
sp_widget.template:
Access Denied

Only L2 Support or L3 Change Management members can create change requests.

Create Change from Problem

Create a change request to implement the resolution for a problem

Change Created Successfully!

{{c.successMessage}}

CAB Approval Required - This change requires CAB approval due to high priority.
Infrastructure Change - Auto-created change tasks will be generated when scheduled.
View Change
{{c.errorMessage}}

Step 1: Select Source Problem

{{prob.number}}
{{prob.short_description}}
{{prob.state_label}} {{prob.category}}
No problems found.
Selected: {{c.selectedProblem.number}} - {{c.selectedProblem.short_description}}
Category: {{c.selectedProblem.category}} / {{c.selectedProblem.subcategory}}

Step 2: Configure Change

Infrastructure changes follow a specific flow with auto task creation

The change will be created with:

  • Short Description: Change: {{c.selectedProblem.short_description}}
  • Category: {{c.selectedProblem.category}} / {{c.selectedProblem.subcategory}}
  • Type: {{c.changeType}}
  • Priority: Calculated from urgency x impact

Infrastructure changes will be put in Assess state and auto-generate 2 change tasks when scheduled.

Searching...
